title: 11 stocks in the S&P 500 expected to form an exclusive growth club for investors
text: Following an 18% decline for the S&P 500 index (with dividends reinvested) in 2022 and a volatile and disappointing pullback from this year's stock-market rebound that crested early in February, some investors may need to be reminded about how well patience can be rewarded.

title: 2 Natural Gas Stocks To Watch Ahead Of April 2023

title: Brokers Suggest Investing in EQT Corporation (EQT): Read This Before Placing a Bet
text: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), EQT Corporation (EQT) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric.

title: The 5 Best- and Worst-Performing Energy Stocks in February 2023
text: The energy sector had a stellar 2022, but it has been largely sitting out the recent broader market rally.
